title: Fix annotation checker not considering base class virtual function annotations
body:
As mentioned in the PR related to parallelizing VariableOrder pass (https://github.com/verilator/verilator/pull/5406#issuecomment-2333371204) checker didn't pick up annotations from base class declarations. This resulted in definitions of such functions to differ annotation-wise. Moreover, bodies of overridden functions were not checked properly when such annotation mismatch occurred.

This PR fixes this by fetching annotations from base class (via `CursorKind.CXX_BASE_SPECIFIER` node) and comparing them with actual annotations used in a function definition.

This way, even in the multiple-inheritance case, it properly matches annotations and catches errors.
